title: DEADROT
tagline: We lost the sky. Now we burn it back.

features.title: No off-switch
features.body: The Scourge isn't evil. It only needs to survive and spread — a hive mind with no general, no plan, and no off-switch. You can't negotiate with need.

features.title: Cut the Choir
features.body: The swarm runs on a signal with a limited radius. Sever it and the horde goes feral — blind, dumb, still lethal. Isolation is the only win.

features.title: One bloody universe
features.body: DOOM's gore meets Blizzard's cohesion. Every game is one entry in the same losing war, clawed back inch by inch.

faq.a: One universe spread across many games. First contact was a battle in the sky, and humanity lost. Everything since is the war to claw it back.

faq.q: Is it one game or many?
faq.a: Many — each a different scale of the same war. Survive the swarm, hold the lane, climb the nest and burn its core. One canon, one horde, one set of rules.
We're building in the open. Join the waitlist and you'll be first through the breach when there's something to fight.
